annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Mo. Rev. Stat. § 408.040 — 8.75% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Missouri’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at revisor.mo.gov. Not legal advice.
